CONTENT.Club career: Born in Larissa, Botis started his career with PAOK, before joining the academy of Italian club Inter Milan in the summer of 2020.On 1 September 2023, Botis joined Serie C club Monopoli on a season-long loan.
CONTENT.External links: Nikolaos Botis at SoccerwayNikolaos Botis at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.International career: In July 2023, Botis was named in the Greece under-19 squad for the 2023 UEFA European Under-19 Championship.

SUMMARY: Nikolaos Nestoras Botis (Greek: Νικόλαος Νέστορας Μπότης; born 31 March 2004) is a Greek professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Super League Greece 2 club Olympiacos B.
